question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

graph.answer:
**Runtime Flow**

The central runtime path is the `Flask` WSGI callable:

- `Flask.__call__` just delegates to `wsgi_app` in [src/flask/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L1618).
- `wsgi_app` creates a request context, pushes it, runs dispatch, then pops the context in [src/flask/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L1566).
- `request_context` builds the context object from the WSGI environ in [src/flask/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L1501).
- `AppContext.from_environ` makes the `Request`, and `AppContext.push` matches the URL and opens the session in [src/flask/ctx.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/ctx.py#L340) and [src/flask/ctx.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/ctx.py#L416).
- `full_dispatch_request` runs `preprocess_request`, then `dispatch_request`, then `finalize_request` in [src/flask/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L992).
- `dispatch_request` is the actual endpoint lookup: it reads `ctx.request.url_rule`, handles automatic `OPTIONS`, then calls `self.view_functions[rule.endpoint]` in [src/flask/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L966).
- `finalize_request` and `process_response` run `after_request` hooks and session saving in [src/flask/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L1021) and [src/flask/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L1394).
- Error branches go through `handle_user_exception` and `handle_exception` in [src/flask/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L865) and [src/flask/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L897).

The important mental model is: route matching happens before the view call, and `dispatch_request` is where the matched endpoint becomes an actual function invocation.

**Setup Flow**

The public route API is setup-time only:

- `@app.route(...)` is `Scaffold.route`, which wraps `add_url_rule` in [src/flask/sansio/scaffold.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/scaffold.py#L336).
- `App.add_url_rule` is where the rule is actually normalized and stored in [src/flask/sansio/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/app.py#L605).
- That method populates `url_map` and `view_functions`, which is exactly what `dispatch_request` reads later.

Blueprints take a parallel path:

- `register_blueprint` calls `Blueprint.register` in [src/flask/sansio/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/app.py#L570).
- `Blueprint.register` creates `BlueprintSetupState` and runs deferred setup callbacks in [src/flask/sansio/blueprints.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/blueprints.py#L273).
- Blueprint route registration uses `BlueprintSetupState.add_url_rule` in [src/flask/sansio/blueprints.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/blueprints.py#L87).

If you touch route registration, also read the `setupmethod` guard in [src/flask/sansio/scaffold.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/scaffold.py#L42); it prevents mutating the app after the first request.

**Class-Based Views**

Class-based views still flow into the same `view_functions[...]` dispatch path:

- `View.dispatch_request` is the abstract endpoint method in [src/flask/views.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/views.py#L78).
- `MethodView.dispatch_request` switches on `request.method` in [src/flask/views.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/views.py#L182).

**Read Next**

Start with these tests in this order:

- `test_request_processing` at [tests/test_basic.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L707)
- `test_request_preprocessing_early_return` at [tests/test_basic.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L732)
- `test_after_request_processing` at [tests/test_basic.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L759)
- `test_error_handling` at [tests/test_basic.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L886)
- `test_before_request_and_routing_errors` at [tests/test_basic.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L956)

5. `tests/test_reqctx.py` and `tests/test_appctx.py` for context semantics:
